title: E2E Test Data Cleanup Implementation Plan

sections.title: Phase 1: Unify the firstname whitelist
tasks: `make test` passes (new whitelist parity test passes)
Search `e2e/utils/auth-helper.ts` and `e2e/utils/hubspot-helper.ts` for hard-coded firstname arrays — only one definition remains (`TEST_FIRST_NAMES` in `hubspot-helper.ts`).
Diff the two SQL statements — both reference the same parameter binding.

sections.title: Phase 2: Paginate Phase 2 search to drain backlog
tasks: Run the full E2E suite locally with the existing backlog present. After teardown, query HubSpot via `searchApi.doSearch` with the same filterGroups manually — count is 0 (or below 100 if a fresh run created new test data that subsequent runs will catch).
Tail the global teardown logs — no warning about hitting the page cap.

sections.title: Phase 3: Close per-spec `afterAll` gaps
tasks: `make test` passes (coverage test passes — every `uniquePhone` paired with `phones.push`)
`make test_e2e` passes (no regression in the four touched specs)

Run the full E2E suite locally on a clean DB + clean HubSpot. After the run completes (and after global teardown): `SELECT count(*) FROM leads WHERE first_name IN (TEST_FIRST_NAMES) OR email LIKE 'e2e-%@test.rekurve.dev'` → 0. HubSpot search by `firstname IN TEST_FIRST_NAMES` → 0 results.
Force-fail one test mid-spec (throw before `afterAll` runs naturally) — confirm `afterAll` still fires and cleans up that test's phone.
Run only `e2e/features/nurture-scheduler.spec.ts` — confirm the `Nurture AutoStart` HubSpot contact is archived within seconds of `afterAll`, not minutes (no search-index dependency).
